reviews.comment:
Soy de mar del plata y tuve un problema con el chapon del cárter. Me atendió marcelo y fui muy bien atendido. Subio la captur en el boxes y me ajusto el chapon
Un fenómeno marcelo. Soy socio del aca más de 30 años y pocas veces fui atendido de esta manera.

(Translated by Google)
I'm from Mar del Plata and I had a problem with the oil pan skid plate. Marcelo helped me and I received excellent service. He put my car in the garage and adjusted the skid plate. Marcelo is fantastic. I've been a member of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) for over 30 years and I've rarely received such great service.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por tu reseña positiva . Nos alegra saber que disfrutaste de tu experiencia con nosotros. ¡Esperamos verte nuevamente!

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16439864451681857894/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURMb09ualhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Bueno, la experiencia, que me dieron un turno para lavar mi vehículo, me lo cambiaron y cuando vengo al segundo turno, me dicen que es cancelado lo cual no era yo la agendada, me lo iban a lavar igual, llegué a las 9:30hs y son las 13:15hs y sigo sin que me laven el vehículo... Creí que me lo daban en el transcurso de la mañana... Pero me dicen que están los demás turno primero... Lamentablemente...
( La administración es la que se organiza mal)

(Translated by Google)
Well, the experience was that I was given an appointment to have my car washed, they changed it, and when I came for the second appointment, they told me it was canceled, even though I wasn't the one scheduled. They were going to wash it anyway. I arrived at 9:30 am and it's now 1:15 pm and they still haven't washed my car... I thought they would give it to me sometime this morning... But they tell me that the other appointments are prioritized... Unfortunately...

(The administration is the one that's disorganized)

reviewReply.comment: Gracias Jesica por tu reseña. Ojala tengamos la posibilidad de volver a verte para que tu experiencia con nosotros sea positiva.!
